Video.summary: Rachel's in labor and about to give birth at any minute with only Cyd to support her because Tony is literally out on a ledge trying to stop a troubled, older cop, who is a friend, from jumping.
Video.title: A Time To Be Born

Video.summary: Although Tony's new baby daughter, Sarah, is giving him many a sleepless night, he is nevertheless determined to outwit a serial rapist.
Video.title: Sleep Of The Just

Video.summary: Tony, distraught when it appears that Phil Reid, one of his best men, may be targeted for revenge by a dangerous escaped convict.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: McCall can't believe that a trauma specialist who once treated her, began drinking again and killed herself.
Video.title: Code 3

Video.summary: A star high-school hockey player and friend of the Scali family - becomes a prime drug-ring suspect.
Video.title: The Puck Stops Here

Video.summary: Tony winds up in one of his own jail cells when he runs afoul of an imperious judge.
Video.title: Judgement Day

Video.summary: A notorious New York rackateer relocates to Eastbridge during the holiday season. Tony now has to be more concerned with peace on his own turf.
Video.title: The Frame

Video.summary: Tony is torn when a series of life-threatening incidents occur in Eastbridge and the only link appears to be Ed Mize, an old, mild-mannered friend currently experiencing marital difficulties.
Video.title: The Two Faces Of Ed

Video.summary: Tony attempts to protect an informant from a mysterious hit man.
Video.title: Shoot The Breeze

Video.summary: While grocery shopping, Rachel runs head-on into a robbery-murder suspect -- and becomes the target of the killer's threats.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: After he shoots a woman in a drunken domestic squabble, Officer Kelly becomes the victim of a campaign.
Video.title: Officer April

Video.summary: SAMMY DAVIS, JR. guest stars as a boxer who helps McCall investigate murders in the world of prize fighting.
Video.title: Ring Of Honor

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall follow a string of torture murders to a money laundering ring and discover an undercover cop
Video.title: Last Run

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a string of robberies, pursue the thieves, and shoot a man who may be innocent.
Video.title: Shoot To Kill

Video.summary: Tony is enraged as a publicity-seeking "video vigilante" metes out punishment to offenders.
Video.title: Video Vigilante

Video.summary: Tony and Paulie investigate a puzzling arson case.
Video.title: Sex, Lies, and Kerosene

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate teenage prostitute murders and the prime suspect is a sadistic cop impersonator.
Video.title: Teen Dreams

Video.summary: Chris falls for a suspected mob assassin.
Video.title: The Perfect Alibi

Video.summary: Rita and Chris must protect Donnie 'Dogs' Dibarto from a notorious mobster named Tony 'Toe Tag' Torino, when he attempts to muscle in on a piece of Dibarto's action and Dibarto decides to turn state's evidence. The situation gets further complicated when a Miami cop named Dexter, who's running the investigation on Torino and is suppose to be providing protection for Dibarto may or may not be on the up and up. When the hitters start getting too close, Rita and Chris must try and determine if Dexter is a 'dirty cop' or not.
Video.title: To Serve And Protect

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy expose a man who staged a shark attack in order to murder his wife.
Video.title: Slip-Up

Video.summary: Tom is intimidated by an old football teammate who's helping with a murder investigation.
Video.title: Rage

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy's investigation a prep school teacher's apparent suicide uncovers his affair with a student.
Video.title: Teacher's Pet

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy uncover a murder victim's search for her sister's rapist.
Video.title: Sea Of Love

Video.summary: The death of a research scientist draws Tom and Cassy into a secret project searching for extraterrestrial life.
Video.title: Total Eclipse

Video.summary: A pair of Miami Beach detectives try to protect an important witness from being killed by his mob boss.
Video.title: Three Ring Circus

Video.summary: Cassy goes undercover to bring down a prison warden who's selling inmates into sexual slavery.
Video.title: The Party
